stemHtml: An aeroplane transitions from steady straight and level flight into a horizontal co-ordinated turn with a load factor of 2, the speed remains constant and the:

options.a: angle of attack increases by a factor of 1/4.
options.b: induced drag increases by a factor of 4.
options.c: total drag increases by a factor of 4.
options.d: lift increases by a factor of 4.
